name: Song Shang Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Song Shang Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells magnetic components, printed circuit boards, and wire products. Its magnetic components include coils, line filters, power chokes, and transformers primarily used in the production of transformers, filters, and inductors, as well as in adapter, LED TV, LCD TV, charger, game console, desktop, monitor, printer, lighting, and communication applications. The company's printed circuit boards are used in consumable electronic products, power supplies, machinery, instruments, and automobile industries, as well as other industries. It also offers wire products for LED TV and display, car audio, battery, power supply equipment, and home appliances. The company was formerly known as K-Bridge Electronics Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Song Shang Electronics Co., Ltd. in March 2011. Song Shang Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
